fields.name: Insurance No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the insurance number to post an insurance coverage entry to.

fields.name: FA No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related fixed asset.

fields.name: FA Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the fixed asset.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date to use as the posting date on the insurance coverage ledger entry.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the appropriate document type for the amount you want to post.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number for the journal line.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total amount the journal line consists of. Credit amounts must be entered with a minus sign.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description that is entered in the Insurance No. field.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Index Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to post an indexation (that is, to index the total value insured).
